research.title: Aetheria Research Commons
research.summary: Open research track for verifiable experimentation, reproducible methodology, and cross-ministry observation networks.

research.title: Protocol Engineering Observatory
research.summary: Core-language and runtime research for protocol correctness, upgrade safety, and formal verification tooling.

research.title: Open Standards Track
research.summary: Evaluation of open technology standards, interoperability agreements, and licensing models for public infrastructure.

policy.title: Innovation Sandbox Policy
policy.summary: Time-limited sandbox operational rules, safety review gates, and graduation criteria for emerging technology work.

policy.title: Data Stewardship Framework
policy.summary: Policies for sensitive datasets, consent metadata, retention schedules, and audit access in research environments.

policy.title: Technology Readiness Review
policy.summary: Standardized readiness scoring, evidence requirements, and sponsorship workflow before public deployment.

standards.title: API Design Standard
standards.summary: REST and event interface patterns for registry, engage, passport, and infrastructure service boundaries.

standards.title: Security Baseline
standards.summary: Mandatory controls for authentication flows, key storage, observability, and incident response readiness.

standards.title: Accessibility Standard
standards.summary: WCAG-linked requirements, localization expectations, and accessibility review gates for public services.
